The '''''Storm''''' was a modified [[Hapan]] [[Miy'til starfighter]] used by [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Isolder]].

==Description==
Isolder personally designed the ''Storm'' using the hull of a standard Miy'til fighter. More than 500,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] worth of refinements turned ''Storm'' into a powerful starfighter.

The ship was just over seven meters long, smaller even than the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptor]]. This required [[Hapan]] engineers to miniaturize many components to make them fit inside the small ship. Isolder commonly flew with a prototype [[R2-Series5 astromech droid]], a gift from [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] during the first negotiations between the New Republic and the Hapes Consortium.

The ''Storm'' was equipped with three [[Taibolt]] 12 anticoncussion-field generators for defense, and was armed with a cluster of triple-linked [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] and a miniconcussion-missile launcher with 10 custom-built missiles. Each wing sported an [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]], complemented by twin [[thermal-detonator bombing tubes]] with a total of 16 [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]].

[[File:Miytil_schem.jpg|thumb|left|180px|''Storm'' [[:Category:Technical drawing images|schematics]].]]

Directly in front of the [[Transparisteel/Legends|transparisteel]] canopy was a communication and sensor jammer very similar to that of the A-wing. This device allowed Isolder to block target locks and communications from enemy fighters. ''Storm''{{'s}} [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] system was equipped with a sophisticated targeting system that allowed them to overcome jamming.

The [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter's]] four [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom]] [[6X4 fusial thrust engine]]s were modified with [[Tykannin]] Class-4 [[Power converter/Legends|power converters]]. Each one had an oversized [[Cygnus Spaceworks/Legends|Cygnus]] turbo generator for short bursts that propelled the ship to speeds one-third faster than that of the [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing]].

==History==
The ''Storm'' became a common sight in battles in the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]], since it was usual for Isolder to personally lead his fighters into battle. During a rescue attempt involving Princess Leia Organa, the ship crash-landed on [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]. The ''Storm'' was recovered and rebuilt after the battle.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'' {{Ab|The Courtship of Princess Leia (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
